primary_diagnosis:
Acute myeloid leukemia, ID 09/2024
Classification according to WHO 2022: AML post cytotoxic therapy (AML-pCT)
Classification according to ICC 2022: AML with recurrent genetic aberrations
(inv(16)(p13.1q22)/CBFB::MYH11)
Initial risk score (after ELN 2022): favorable
At initial diagnosis:
o Peripheral blood: Hb 10,3 g/dl, Plt 89/nl, WBC 5,8/nl
o Bone marrow cytology: 52% blasts
o FACS (BM): LAIP with ED: CD34+/-, CD117+, HLA-DR+, MPO+, CD33+, CD13+; negative for
CD19, CD3, CD7, TdT
o Cytogenetics: 46,XY,inv(16)(p13.1q22)[17]/46,XY[3]
o FISH: Detection CBFB-Rearrangement; Exclusion KMT2A-Rearrangement, t(8;21), t(9;22),
t(15;17); no deletions 5q, 7q, 17p
o Molecular genetics (BM): CBFB::MYH11 Typ A transcripts positive; FLT3 neg., NPM1
neg., IDH1/2 neg., KIT Exon 17 D816V pos., CEBPA WT, DDX41 neg.
question: Pathogenic variant? Targeted Therapy?
tumor_board_decision: Pathogenic variant. Enrollment in KIT-Inhibitor study.
raw_vignette:
Age: 63
ECOG: 1
Primary diagnosis:
Acute myeloid leukemia, ID 09/2024
Classification according to WHO 2022: AML post cytotoxic therapy (AML-pCT)
Classification according to ICC 2022: AML with recurrent genetic aberrations
(inv(16)(p13.1q22)/CBFB::MYH11)
Initial risk score (after ELN 2022): favorable
At initial diagnosis:
o Peripheral blood: Hb 10,3 g/dl, Plt 89/nl, WBC 5,8/nl
o Bone marrow cytology: 52% blasts
o FACS (BM): LAIP with ED: CD34+/-, CD117+, HLA-DR+, MPO+, CD33+, CD13+; negative for
CD19, CD3, CD7, TdT
o Cytogenetics: 46,XY,inv(16)(p13.1q22)[17]/46,XY[3]
o FISH: Detection CBFB-Rearrangement; Exclusion KMT2A-Rearrangement, t(8;21), t(9;22),
t(15;17); no deletions 5q, 7q, 17p
o Molecular genetics (BM): CBFB::MYH11 Typ A transcripts positive; FLT3 neg., NPM1
neg., IDH1/2 neg., KIT Exon 17 D816V pos., CEBPA WT, DDX41 neg.
Secondary diagnoses:
Arterial hypertension
Type 2 diabetes mellitus
Treatment and course:
Molecular genetic findings
Question for the tumor board:
Pathogenic variant? Targeted Therapy?
Tumor board decision:
Pathogenic variant. Enrollment in KIT-Inhibitor study.
================================================================================
TREATMENT TIMELINE
================================================================================
03.02.2022 BMA: 60% blasts.
08.02.2022 Cycle 1 Azacitidin/Venetoclax.
13.02.2022 blood count: WBC 2,6/nl (blasts 0%), Hb 7,8 g/dl, Platelets 27/nl.
23.02.2022 BMA: 3% blasts (cyCR); FACS: MRD positive (0,12% blasts, LAIP). Mol. Gene.:
CBF::MYH11 155,4.
15.03.2022 Cycle 2 Azacitidin/Venetoclax.
05.04.2022 Remission assessment (BMA): cyCR, 1% blasts; FACS: MRD negative; Mol.
Gene.: CBF::MYH11 2,4%.
12.04.2022 Cycle 3: Azacitidin 75 mg/m2 Day 1-7 + Venetoclax 100 mg Day 1-17
(shortened with infection).
08./09.05.2022 G-CSF with febrile infection in aplasia.
16.05.2022 Remission assessment (BMA, external): cyCR; FACS: MRD negative.
18.05.2022 Cycle 4: Azacitidin 75 mg/m2 Day 1-5 + Venetoclax 100 mg Day 1-14.
13.06.2022 Remission assessment (PB, molecular): CBF::MYH11/ABL1 0,105%.
20.06.2022 Cycle 5: Azacitidin 75 mg/m2 Day 1-5 + Venetoclax 100 mg Day 1-14.
12.07.2022 Remission assessment (BM, molecular): CBF::MYH11/ABL1 0,112%.
26.07.2022 Cycle 6: Azacitidin 75 mg/m2 Day 1-5 + Venetoclax 400 mg Day 1-14.
14.09.2022 Remission assessment: complete remission; CBF::MYH11/ABL1 0,082% (PB).
20.09.2022 Cycle 7: Azacitidin 75 mg/m2 Day 1-5 + Venetoclax 400 mg Day 1-14.
02.11.2022 Remission assessment: hematologic CR; CBF::MYH11/ABL1 0,098% (PB) and
0,098% (BM).
03.11.2022 Cycle 8: Venetoclax 400 mg (28 days) + Azacitidin 75 mg/m2 Day 1-7.

30.11.2022 PB (molecular): CBF::MYH11/ABL1 0,030%.
07.12.2022 PB (molecular): CBF::MYH11/ABL1 0,021%.
13.12.2022 Cycle 9: Azacitidin 75 mg/m2 Day 1-5 + Venetoclax 400 mg Day 1-21.
17.01.2023 Remission assessment (PB, molecular): CBF::MYH11/ABL1 0,079%.
27.01.2023 Cycle 10: Azacitidin 75 mg/m2 Day 1-5 + Venetoclax 400 mg Day 1-21.
07.03.2023 Molecular relapse: CBF::MYH11/ABL1 5,2% (PB).
21.03.2023 HiDAC 1 g/m2 bid Day 1-3.
05.05.2023 Hematologic Relapse.
================================================================================
